Summary: EPIC-01 Foundation and Instrumentation Spine
Description: Establish delivery safety, observability, and analytics foundation before feature acceleration.

Summary: SP1-01 Add migration framework and schema versioning
Description: Implement migration runner, schema version table, and rollback command with dry-run support.

Summary: SP1-02 Add smoke tests for auth, stocks, and webhook signature
Description: Create smoke tests for auth session flow, stocks endpoint health, and webhook signature validation.

Summary: SP1-03 Add API and webhook observability dashboards
Description: Add metrics, traces, and alerts for API 5xx, webhook failures, and p95 latency.

Summary: SP1-04 Define and freeze event taxonomy v1
Description: Finalize event names, categories, and required properties for funnel and retention analytics.

Summary: SP1-05 Build analytics ingestion endpoint with schema validation
Description: Implement server endpoint to ingest events with strict schema validation and rejection logging.

Summary: EPIC-02 User-Owned Data Features
Description: Implement sticky user workflows first: watchlists, saved screeners, alerts, and preferences.

Summary: SP2-01 Implement watchlists and watchlist_items APIs
Description: Create CRUD APIs and indexes for watchlists and watchlist items.

Summary: SP2-02 Implement saved_screeners APIs
Description: Create CRUD APIs for saved screener filters, sort presets, and reusable views.

Summary: SP2-03 Wire watchlist and saved screener UI to real APIs
Description: Replace placeholders with persisted user data interactions across core pages.

Summary: SP2-04 Implement alert rules v1 with trigger history
Description: Support price_above and price_below alerts with alert_triggers persistence.

Summary: SP2-05 Persist profile preferences and notification settings
Description: Store and load locale and notification preferences per user profile.

Summary: EPIC-03 Research Data Pipeline V1
Description: Build data moat with deep fundamentals, ownership snapshots, and alternative sentiment signals.

Summary: SP3-01 Split datasets into master and daily fact tables
Description: Create stocks_master, stocks_market_daily, and stocks_governance_daily with partition strategy.

Summary: SP3-02 Add ownership snapshots and concentration metrics pipeline
Description: Generate daily ownership snapshots and concentration indicators by symbol.

Summary: SP3-03 Expand fundamentals schema for 3-5 year history
Description: Add multi-year financial statements and accounting quality factors for screening.

Summary: SP3-04 Build alternative sentiment ingestion v1
Description: Ingest and normalize sentiment features from news and social signals for LQ45 focus set.

Summary: SP3-05 Add data lineage and quality gates
Description: Track freshness, null rates, split-adjust checks, and dataset-level quality scores.

Summary: EPIC-04 Advanced Screening Intelligence
Description: Convert deep data into differentiated screening and statistical analysis workflows.

Summary: SP4-01 Implement statistical filters and factor screens
Description: Add z-score, rolling volatility, regression beta, and dispersion-based filters.

Summary: SP4-02 Build multi-factor scoring engine v2 with explainability
Description: Upgrade scoring to include accounting and sentiment factors with feature contribution output.

Summary: SP4-03 Add advanced screener UI for quant filters
Description: Expose advanced controls and presets in UI for serious investor workflows.

Summary: SP4-04 Add backtest-lite signal history module
Description: Provide signal history and hit-rate summary for screening criteria over historical windows.

Summary: SP4-05 Build cohort and funnel dashboard for feature adoption
Description: Track stickiness and conversion by watchlist, alerts, and advanced filter adoption.

Summary: EPIC-05 Billing Ledger Core Hardened
Description: Implement resilient billing state machine after product value and usage are established.

Summary: SP5-01 Create subscriptions and invoices collections with indexes
Description: Create subscription lifecycle and invoice schemas with operational indexes.

Summary: SP5-02 Create payment_transactions with strict idempotency keys
Description: Persist payment lifecycle with unique keys for order and provider transaction ids.

Summary: SP5-03 Persist pending payment at checkout creation
Description: Write pending transaction row during payment intent/token creation.

Summary: SP5-04 Implement webhook state machine and exactly-once plan upgrade
Description: Support out-of-order/retry-safe webhook handling and atomic plan upgrade execution.

Summary: SP5-05 Add reconciliation jobs and finance audit endpoints
Description: Build daily reconciliation and internal endpoints for failed, pending, and settled records.

Summary: EPIC-06 API Monetization and Low-Latency Metering
Description: Monetize data access with scalable API key controls and fast quota enforcement.

Summary: SP6-01 Implement API keys with secure hashing and scope model
Description: Create API key issuance/revocation and endpoint scope mapping by plan.

Summary: SP6-02 Build Redis-based real-time rate limiter and quota counters
Description: Use Redis token bucket/counters for low-latency request checks.

Summary: SP6-03 Add async usage write-behind to durable store
Description: Stream usage to persistent storage asynchronously for billing and analytics.

Summary: SP6-04 Define API product packages and plan scopes
Description: Package core, enriched, and historical APIs with enforceable entitlements.

Summary: SP6-05 Build usage dashboard and invoice-ready export
Description: Expose usage, overages, and CSV export for finance operations.

Summary: EPIC-07 Paywall Activation and Growth Optimization
Description: Activate paywall with a feature-based free tier and conversion experiments.

Summary: SP7-01 Re-enable backend gating with feature-tier policy
Description: Gate advanced statistical and sentiment features while keeping basic screening free.

Summary: SP7-02 Re-enable frontend premium access controls and upgrade UX
Description: Restore premium tab gating and contextual upgrade prompts.

Summary: SP7-03 Launch pricing and CTA experiments
Description: Run A/B tests on pricing presentation, trial messaging, and upgrade CTAs.

Summary: SP7-04 Add cancellation flow and churn feedback capture
Description: Capture churn reasons and emit structured churn events for retention analysis.

Summary: SP7-05 Run hypercare with rollback triggers and SLO guardrails
Description: Monitor conversion, payment integrity, and latency with incident playbook activation.
